root_text.an6.141:1.3: Buddhānussati, dhammānussati, saṅghānussati, sīlānussati, cāgānussati, devatānussati.
root_text.an6.141:1.4: Rāgassa, bhikkhave, abhiññāya ime cha dhammā bhāvetabbā”ti.

translation_text.an6.141:1.1: “For insight into greed, six things should be developed.
translation_text.an6.141:1.3: The recollection of the Buddha, the teaching, the Saṅgha, ethics, generosity, and the deities.
translation_text.an6.141:1.4: For insight into greed, these six things should be developed.”
